stemHtml: A departing aircraft experiencing radio communication failure on an IFR flight under radar vectors is to squawk 7600 and…

options.a: maintain present heading for 1 minute and thereafter return to the route indicated in the current flight plan on the shortest way.
options.b: regardless of any limitation previously instructed by ATC, return to the route indicated in the current flight plan in the most direct manner.
options.c: maintain the heading last assigned by ATC for a period of 3 minutes and then return to the flight path in accordance with the current flight plan.
options.d: proceed to the route indicated in the current flight plan in the most direct manner.
